qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.d_ape_y_nom as TEXT, LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo as CODE, LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.oi_liquidacion_ddo, LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_per_emp_ddo as ID, SEC.policy FROM LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP , LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER , LIQ99_RECIBOS, NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Liquidacion.LegajoEmpresaDDO.PER_EMP_DDO\') as SEC JOIN LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_per_emp_ddo INNER LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.oi_per_emp_ddo, LIQ99_RECIBOS.oi_tot_liq_per INNER LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.oi_tot_liq_per, LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_per_emp_ddo LEFT OUTER SEC.id WHERE LIQ99_RECIBOS.oi_liquidacion_ddo = {#SOURCE:helper-mess/@Liquidacion} AND LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_per_emp_ddo = {#SOURCE:helper-mess/@ID} ORDER BY CODE asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.d_ape_y_nom as TEXT, LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo as CODE, LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.oi_liquidacion_ddo, LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_per_emp_ddo as ID, SEC.policy FROM LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP , LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER ,LIQ99_RECIBOS, NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Liquidacion.LegajoEmpresaDDO.PER_EMP_DDO\') as SEC JOIN LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_per_emp_ddo INNER LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.oi_per_emp_ddo, LIQ99_RECIBOS.oi_tot_liq_per INNER LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.oi_tot_liq_per, LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_per_emp_ddo LEFT OUTER SEC.id WHERE LIQ99_RECIBOS.oi_liquidacion_ddo = {#SOURCE:helper-mess/@Liquidacion} AND LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo = {substring_before(#INDOC:@CODE,\'-\')} ORDER BY CODE asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql(' SELECT LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.d_ape_y_nom as TEXT, LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo as CODE, LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.oi_liquidacion_ddo, LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_per_emp_ddo as ID, SEC.policy FROM LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP , LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER ,LIQ99_RECIBOS, NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Liquidacion.LegajoEmpresaDDO.PER_EMP_DDO\') as SEC
JOIN LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_per_emp_ddo INNER LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.oi_per_emp_ddo, LIQ99_RECIBOS.oi_tot_liq_per INNER LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.oi_tot_liq_per, LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_per_emp_ddo LEFT OUTER SEC.id WHERE LIQ99_RECIBOS.oi_liquidacion_ddo = {#SOURCE:helper-mess/@Liquidacion} ORDER BY CODE asc
')/ROWS/ROW
